message: Add 11 spawnable enemies with per-family asset files and measured weapon hitboxes, crouch and dash abilities, knight animation fixes, the sandbox2 night theme, and a reworked menu

Add save stations with browser saves and restore codes, a game-over screen, God Mode, map select, and a loading screen, scale the HUD bars with the window, fix knight route flip-flopping, and clean out the audition files
Redo the menus with an animated starfield, persist sound settings, add UI click and new menu music, fix speed-boost jumping, and reset cleanly on quit instead of reloading
Rebalance cards and spawning around the new progression.js XP track, with tiered card ramps, accent borders, and a matching SpawnModel mirror
